# CPListItem.AssistantCellVisibility.whileLimitedUIActive

**Case**

The assistant cell is visible only while Limited UI mode is active.

## Declaration

```swift
case whileLimitedUIActive
```

## Controlling the Assistant Cell Visibility

- **CPListItem.AssistantCellVisibility.off**: The assistant cell isn’t visible.
- **CPListItem.AssistantCellVisibility.always**: The assistant cell is always visible.

items.description: The assistant cell is always visible.
items.name: CPListItem.AssistantCellVisibility.always
